title: Generate a CDS analytics model from operational tables
subtitle: Copilot replay showing a governed analytics path: table inspection, reusable dimensions, cube generation, activation, and optional query.
outcome: A planned CDS star schema and query layer from SAP system metadata.

start.text: Create an analytics model for billing items. I want a cube with dimensions and a query, but show me the plan before any write.

table.summary: ARC-1 reads DDIC metadata before proposing analytical CDS artifacts.
table.result: Fields: Client, BillingDocument, Item, CompanyCode, Customer, Currency, NetAmount, TaxAmount, BillingDate, Product.

reuse.summary: The analytics skill prefers reusable released dimensions over inventing every view.
reuse.result: Reusable views found: I_CompanyCode, I_Customer, I_Product, I_CalendarDate. No custom text view needed for CompanyCode.

decision.prompt: The analytics plan is ready. What should the replay show next?

options.label: Show plan only
options.description: Stop at a human approval artifact.

options.label: Simulate create
options.description: Show the batch_create and activation sequence.

panel.title: CDS analytics plan
panel.body: The safe approval artifact lists every object before writes: interface cube ZI_BILLING_CUBE, projection cube ZC_BILLING_CUBE, optional text/dimension helpers only where released SAP views are missing, and query ZQ_BILLING_OVERVIEW.

create.summary: Interdependent CDS objects are created together and activated at the end.
create.result: Created 3 DDLS objects. Activation deferred until the cube and query are both present.

activate.summary: Activation validates provider contracts and dependencies in SAP.

items.label: Next validation
items.value: Read query elements and run consumer smoke

done.text: This replay turns the analytics skills into a product demo: inspect real table metadata, reuse released dimensions, stop for approval, and only then generate the analytical CDS stack.
